activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
activities.learning_activity: (a) Explain the concept of the Bible and Bible Knowledge
suggested_methods: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the meaning of Bible and Bible Knowledge
activities.assessment_criteria: The Concept of the Bible and Bible knowledge is well explained.

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
activities.learning_activity: (b) Classify the books in the Bible
suggested_methods: Discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the classification of the books in the Bible
activities.assessment_criteria: The books in the Bible are well classified

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
activities.learning_activity: (c) Explain the concept of the Book of Genesis
suggested_methods: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of the Book of Genesis
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of the Book of Genesis is well explained

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
activities.learning_activity: (d) Describe the concept of God’s creation
suggested_methods: Debate: Guide students to debate on the concept of God’s creation
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of God’s creation is well described

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
activities.learning_activity: (e) Clarify man’s responsibility for God’s creations
suggested_methods: Skills Lab: Guide students in manageable groups to identify living and non-living organisms existing in their environment and relate their responses on the man’s responsibilities for God’s creation
activities.assessment_criteria: Man’s Responsibility for God’s creation are well clarified.

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.1 Use the Book of Genesis to learn about creation, responsibility and taking care of life
activities.learning_activity: (f) Explain the importance of taking care of life and the environment
suggested_methods: Discussion: Guide students to discuss and present the importance of taking care of life and environment
activities.assessment_criteria: The importance of taking care of life and environment are well explained

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Genesis
activities.learning_activity: (a) Analyse the Fall of Man and its consequences
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in managable groups to discuss the fall of man and its consequences
activities.assessment_criteria: The Fall of Man and its consequences are well analysed
suggested_resources: video the fall of man and its consequences and bible commentaries

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Genesis
activities.learning_activity: (b) Describe the history of the biblical Patriarchs
suggested_methods: Case study: Provide a case study on the history of Abraham, Isaac, Jacob and Joseph. Guide students in manageable groups to discuss, summarize and present the history of Patriarchs according to case study
activities.assessment_criteria: The Patriarchal History are well described
suggested_resources: relevant biblical text and ICT simulation tools

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.3 Use the Book of Exodus to understand God’s love and compassion
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the Concept of the Book of Exodus
suggested_methods: Brainstorming:Guide students to brainstorm the concept of the Book of Exodus
activities.assessment_criteria: The Concept of the Book of Exodus is well described

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.3 Use the Book of Exodus to understand God’s love and compassion
activities.learning_activity: (b) Show how the concept of God’s love and compassion appears in the Book of Exodus
suggested_methods: Guest speaker: Invite a Theologian to give a speech on the concept of God’s love and compassion
Guide students in manageable groups to summarize and share their understanding on God’s love and compassion
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of God’s love and compassion appeared in the Book of Exodus is well shown

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.3 Use the Book of Exodus to understand God’s love and compassion
activities.learning_activity: (c) Identify the consequences of not appreciating God’s Love and Compassion
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss and identify the consequences of not appreciating God’s love and compassion
activities.assessment_criteria: The consequences of not appreciating God’s Love and Compassion are well identified

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of God’s commandments as outlined in the Book of Exodus
activities.learning_activity: (a) Explain the Sinai Covenant
suggested_methods: Guest speaker: Invite the knowledgeable person to provide knowledge of Sinai Covenant, then let the students discuss, and share their findings before the class
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of the Sinai Covenant is well explained
suggested_resources: biblical charts and videos on Sinai Covenant

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of God’s commandments as outlined in the Book of Exodus
activities.learning_activity: (b) Clarify God’s Commandments as stated in the Book of Exodus
suggested_methods: Jigsaw: Guide students through jigsaw to clarify God’s Commandments
activities.assessment_criteria: God’s Commandments as stated in the book of Exodus are well clarified
suggested_resources: biblical charts and videos on Sinai Covenant

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of God’s commandments as outlined in the Book of Exodus
activities.learning_activity: (c) Show the indicators of Moses’ leadership qualities
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in groups to discuss, summarize and share the indicators of Moses’s leadership qualities
activities.assessment_criteria: The indicators of Moses’ leadership qualities are well shown

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate an appreciation of the importance of statistics based on the Book of Numbers
activities.learning_activity: (a) Explain the concept of statistics as revealed in the Book of Numbers.
suggested_methods: Debate: Guide students in two managaeable groups to debate a motion on the statistics based on the Books of Numbers
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of statistics in the book of Numbers is well explained.
suggested_resources: biblical charts and videos on the book of numbers

activities.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate an understanding of Creation and God’s commandments
activities.specific_competence: 1.5 Demonstrate an appreciation of the importance of statistics based on the Book of Numbers
activities.learning_activity: (b) Use the Book of Numbers to discuss the objectives and importance of statistics and the census in society
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in a manageable groups to discuss the objectives and importance of statistics and the census in society
activities.assessment_criteria: The objectives of census in various contexts are well discussed.
suggested_resources: biblical charts and videos on the book of numbers

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate an understanding of faith by living a holy life
activities.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Joshua
activities.learning_activity: (a) Identify the main ideas in the book of Joshua
suggested_methods: Exploration: Divide the students in manageable groups to read, and identify main ideas in the Book of Joshua
activities.assessment_criteria: The main ideas in the Book of Joshua are well identified

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate an understanding of faith by living a holy life
activities.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Joshua
activities.learning_activity: (b) Use the Book of Joshua to discuss the importance of preparing leaders
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the importance of preparing leaders
activities.assessment_criteria: The importance of preparing leaders are well shown

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate an understanding of faith by living a holy life
activities.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture through the Book of Joshua
activities.learning_activity: (c) Describe the fall of the biblical cities of Jericho and Ai
suggested_methods: Scenario: Provide a scenario on the fall of Jericho and Ai cities, Let them summarize and share their findings
activities.assessment_criteria: The fall of the cities of Jericho and Ai is well described

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate an understanding of faith by living a holy life
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Use the Book of Joshua to appreciate the importance of courage, bravery, humility, perseverance and patriotism
activities.learning_activity: (a) Discuss the indicators of strength and bravery according to the Book of Joshua
suggested_methods: Presentation: Guide students to discuss and present about the indicators of strength and bravery found in the book of Joshua
activities.assessment_criteria: The indicators of strength and bravery according to the book of Joshua are well clarified.
suggested_resources: biblical videos on the book of Joshua

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate an understanding of faith by living a holy life
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Use the Book of Joshua to appreciate the importance of courage, bravery, humility, perseverance and patriotism
activities.learning_activity: (b) Use the Book of Joshua to discuss the importance of bravery, humility and perseverance
suggested_methods: Role play: Arrange students in manageable groups to prepare a play showing the importance of bravery, humanity and perseverance
activities.assessment_criteria: The importance of bravery, humility and perseverance according to the book of Joshua are well shown.
suggested_resources: biblical videos on the book of Joshua

activities.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate an understanding of faith by living a holy life
activities.specific_competence: 2.2 Use the Book of Joshua to appreciate the importance of courage, bravery, humility, perseverance and patriotism
activities.learning_activity: (c) Explain the concept of patriotism as appears in the Book of Joshua
suggested_methods: Guest speaker: Invite a person to give speech on patriotism as it appears in the Book of Joshua
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of patriotism as appears in the book of Joshua is well explained
suggested_resources: biblical videos on the book of Joshua

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.learning_activity: (a) Explain the term Gospel and Jewish institutions
suggested_methods: Debate: Organize two groups to run the motion about the Gospel and Jewish institutions Let them classify the books of the Gospel
activities.assessment_criteria: The term Gospel and the books of the Gospel, as well as Jewish institutions are are well explained.
suggested_resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.learning_activity: (b) Discuss the authorship of the Gospel according to Luke (author, recipients and purpose)
suggested_methods: Presentation:Guide students to discuss and present about the authorship of the Gospel according to Luke
activities.assessment_criteria: The authorship of the gospel according to Luke is well discussed
suggested_resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.learning_activity: (c) Discuss the themes of the Gospel according to Luke (salvation for all, the work of the Holy Spirit, worship and praise, the role of women, the Gospel of the lost and the Gospel of prayer)
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students to discuss and share themes found in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.assessment_criteria: The themes of the Gospel according to Luke are well discussed
suggested_resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.learning_activity: (d) Identify the methods used by Jesus in his Ministry (parables and miracles)
suggested_methods: Assignment: Assign students in different groups to identify the methods used by Jesus in his ministries
activities.assessment_criteria: The methods used by Jesus in his ministry (parables and miracles) are well identified
suggested_resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.learning_activity: (e) Use the Gospel according to Luke to defend human rights
suggested_methods: Jigsaw: Guide students through jigsaw to apply the gospel in their daily life to defend human right
activities.assessment_criteria: The Gospel according to Luke in defending human rights is well applied
suggested_resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.1 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Gospel according to Luke
activities.learning_activity: (f) Discuss how the themes in the Gospel according to Luke relate to daily life (choose one theme for course work/project to be submitted in Form IV)
suggested_methods: Project activity: Task students to relate the themes of the Gospel according to Luke with daily life situation
activities.assessment_criteria: The themes of the Gospel according to Luke and how they relate to daily life situation are well discussed
suggested_resources: relevant biblical books such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.2 Use the Gospel according to Luke to appreciate the importance of family life
activities.learning_activity: (a) Explain the concept of family
suggested_methods: Guest speake: Invite a person to give speech based on experience on family matters to students
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of family is well explained
suggested_resources: commentaries and videos on family life

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.2 Use the Gospel according to Luke to appreciate the importance of family life

suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide the students to discuss characteristics of the families found in the gospel according to Luke
activities.assessment_criteria: The characteristics of the families found in the gospel according to Luke is well discussed
suggested_resources: commentaries and videos on family life

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.2 Use the Gospel according to Luke to discuss good parental care
activities.learning_activity: (c) Use the Gospel according to Luke to discuss good parental care
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the concept of good parental care
activities.assessment_criteria: The concept of good parental care as outlined in the gospel according to Luke is well discussed
suggested_resources: commentaries and videos on family life

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.3 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Book of Acts of the Apostles
activities.learning_activity: (a) Discuss the authorship of the Book of the Acts of the Apostles (author, recipients and purpose)
suggested_methods: Jigsaw: Guide students through Jigsaw to explore the author, recipients and purpose of the writing of the book of Acts of the Apostles of the Book of Acts of the Apostles
activities.assessment_criteria: The Author, recipients and purpose of the writing of the book of Acts of the Apostles are clearly discussed
suggested_resources: Bible and relevant biblical texts such as commentaries

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible

suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the themes appears in the book of Acts
activities.assessment_criteria: The themes as appeared in the book of Acts of the Apostles are well discussed

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.3 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Book of Acts of the Apostles
activities.learning_activity: (c) Use the Book of the Acts of the Apostles to defend human rights

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of devotion to spreading the Gospel
activities.learning_activity: (a) Use the Book of the Acts of the Apostles to discuss the commission and order to spread the Gospel
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Use group discussion to identify the commission and order in spreading the Gospel
activities.assessment_criteria: The commission and order in spreading the Gospel as shown in the book of the Acts of the Apostle are well identified

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of devotion to spreading the Gospel
activities.learning_activity: (b) Explain the role of the Holy Spirit in spreading the Gospel
suggested_methods: Think-pair-share: Guide students to think-pair-share the role of the Holy Spirit in spreading the Gospel
activities.assessment_criteria: The role of the Holy Spirit in spreading the Gospel is well explained

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of devotion to spreading the Gospel
activities.learning_activity: (a) Describe the life of the early Christian community and their role in spreading the Gospel
suggested_methods: Scenario: Use a scenario to describe the life of the early Christian Church
activities.assessment_criteria: The life of the early Christian community in spreading the Gospel is well described

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of devotion to spreading the Gospel
activities.learning_activity: (b) Discuss the acts of courage as revealed in the Book of the Acts of the Apostles
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students through group discussion to identify the Acts of Courage as seen in the Book of the Acts of the Apostles
activities.assessment_criteria: Acts of Courage (boldness) as seen in the book of Acts of the Apostles are well discussed

activities.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
activities.specific_competence: 3.4 Demonstrate an appreciation of devotion to spreading the Gospel
activities.learning_activity: (c) Discuss Saul’s conversion and his missionary journeys
suggested_methods: Debate: Lead students through debate to discuss Saul’s conversion and his missionary Journeys
activities.assessment_criteria: Saul’s conversion and his missionary journeys are well discussed .

activities.main_competence: 3.5 Use the Book of Acts of the Apostles to appreciate the importance of justice, peace and equality
activities.specific_competence: 3.5 Use the Book of Acts of the Apostles to appreciate the importance of justice, peace and equality
activities.learning_activity: (a) Determine the resolution of conflicts during the growth of the early Church
suggested_methods: Guest speaker: Use a resourceful person to present the resolutions of Jerusalem council
activities.assessment_criteria: The resolution of conflicts during the growth of the Church are well determined

activities.main_competence: 3.5 Use the Book of Acts of the Apostles to appreciate the importance of justice, peace and equality
activities.specific_competence: 3.5 Use the Book of Acts of the Apostles to appreciate the importance of justice, peace and equality
activities.learning_activity: (b) Discuss the importance, functions and qualities of deacons used in the early Church
suggested_methods: Group discussion: Guide students to discuss the reasons and qualities used in finding deacons during the growth of the Church
activities.assessment_criteria: The reasons and qualities used in finding Deacons during the growth of the church are well discussed

activities.main_competence: 3.5 Use the Book of Acts of the Apostles to appreciate the importance of justice, peace and equality
activities.specific_competence: 3.5 Use the Book of Acts of the Apostles to appreciate the importance of justice, peace and equality
activities.learning_activity: (c) Discuss the methods used by the Jerusalem Council to solve conflict and bring peace, equality and unity in the early Church
suggested_methods: Role play: Guide students to do a play on methods used to solve conflict by Jerusalem Council
activities.assessment_criteria: The methods used in solving the conflict by Jerusalem Council to bring peace, equality and unity are well discussed.
